headline: Sabah Project IC Survivors Demand Royal Commission
context: Over 3,000 descendants of Project IC recipients rallied in Kota Kinabalu in February 2026 demanding a second Royal Commission of Inquiry.

cards.big: 3,000 rallied in Kota Kinabalu demanding new Project IC inquiry
cards.sub: First RCI in 2013 produced 18 recommendations but only 4 implemented

cards.big: NRD flagged 112,000 dubious identity cards issued between 1990 and 2003
cards.sub: Sabah electoral rolls swelled by 300% during the period in question

cards.big: Former NRD officer testified 67 issuance centres operated without oversight
cards.sub: Documents allegedly linked operations to then-Chief Minister office directly

cards.big: Sabah population grew from 1.7 million in 1990 to 3.9 million by 2020
cards.sub: Census data shows foreign-born residents comprise 27% of Sabah population

cards.big: Project IC exposes whether political engineering can be undone through accountability
Project IC created voters from migrants. The survivors' demand for a royal commission is overdue.
